email.subject: RE: Meeting with Colm Coffey and Wim Kees Janssen (Syntho)
email.body:
Hi Colm

Unfortunately, I have an on-site meeting. Can you use the re-scheduling URL to find an alternative slot?

Kind Regards,

Wim Kees Janssen
CEO & Founder

[cid:image001.png@01DCA250.5EF17C80]
kees@syntho.ai<mailto:kees@syntho.ai>
[cid:image002.png@01DCA250.5EF17C80]
www.syntho.ai<https://www.syntho.ai/>
[cid:image003.png@01DCA250.5EF17C80]
John M. Keynesplein 12 1066 EP Amsterdam, The Netherlands


Schedule a meeting: https://www.syntho.ai/kees

[cid:image004.png@01DCA250.5EF17C80]

-----Original Appointment-----
From: Wim Kees Janssen <kees@syntho.ai>
Sent: Thursday, 12 February 2026 16:11
To: Wim Kees Janssen; Colm Coffey; edouard@caraomics.ai
Subject: Meeting with Colm Coffey and Wim Kees Janssen (Syntho)
When: Friday, 20 February 2026 10:30-11:00 (UTC+01:00) Amsterdam, Berlin, Bern, Rome, Stockholm, Vienna.
Where: https://calendly.com/events/3021df4a-1d68-405f-b241-a69bffeec40b/microsoft_teams


Thanks for scheduling this meeting with me, Colm Coffey, I am looking forward to this session!



Details

Please share anything that will help prepare for our meeting: Building digital health twins for pharma/medtech. Clients need synthetic data to fill gaps in sparse clinical datasets and handle privacy constraints. Curious how Syntho's approach maps to medical data generation for model training.



Re-schedule?

Need to make changes to this event?
Cancel: https://calendly.com/cancellations/8ea9aee4-ae2f-4371-9965-ddd464fb4210
Reschedule: https://calendly.com/reschedulings/8ea9aee4-ae2f-4371-9965-ddd464fb4210

Vergadering-id: 310 246 966 229 19
Wachtwoordcode: wu2HY3Ch
________________________________
Heeft u hulp nodig?<https://aka.ms/JoinTeamsMeeting?omkt=nl-NL> | Systeemreferentie<https://teams.microsoft.com/l/meetup-join/19%3ameeting_MTNjNTYwMDItNzg4MS00ZjE5LWI3OWUtZTA2ZTI5ZDEzYWNh%40thread.v2/0?context=%7b%22Tid%22%3a%226ca61575-b998-4ca9-8b6b-ddb17fba6b06%22%2c%22Oid%22%3a%22ec805abd-c8a6-4d18-98e7-e25664c65464%22%7d>

email.subject: Fwd: Venture Academy – Selection Interview & Pitch Scheduling
email.body:
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Sven van der Vlies <sven.vandervlies@plnt.nl>
Date: Fri 20 Feb 2026 at 10:40
Subject: Venture Academy – Selection Interview & Pitch Scheduling
To: Colm Coffey <colm@caraomics.ai>


Hi Colm,

I hope you’re enjoying the Startup Play programme and that you’re learning
a lot while working on your startup idea.

We know that you’re currently still fully immersed in the Startup Play
process, but we would already like to invite you to the *next step: the
Venture Academy*. Participation in the Venture Academy starts with a short
selection process, consisting of a brief pitch interview.
Selection interview
The next step is a selection interview, during which you will give a
5-minute pitch about your startup idea.

*The interview structure (15 minutes total):*
5 minutes – Pitch presentation
10 minutes – Q&A session

*You can choose a time slot on one of the following dates:*
16/03, 14:00 – 17:00
18/03, 14:00 – 17:00
20/03, 09:00 – 12:00

Please schedule your session via this link
<https://calendly.com/christian-ramakers-plnt/new-meeting>. The interviews
will take place at PLNT in Leiden.

*Pitch deck submission*
To guide your pitch, we have provided an outline with the key information
we would like to see included.

Please send your pitch deck no later than *Wednesday 11/03*.

If you have any questions, feel free to call or email me. And if you can’t
get enough of working on your startup already, go ahead and register for
the Venture Academy selection pitches!
We’re looking forward to hearing your pitch.

Met vriendelijke groet/ kind regards,



*Sven van der Vlies*
Talent Scout


*T* +31 648146825
*W* www.plnt.nl / https://unlock.bio/

Altijd op de hoogte blijven? Schrijf je hier
<https://contact.plnt.nl/aanmelden-plnt-update> in voor onze nieuwsbrief!

meeting_details.topic: Venture Academy selection interview - 5 minute pitch about startup idea with Q&A session

19c7a78da12dbedf.reply_text:
Hi Sven,

Thanks for the invitation to the Venture Academy – we're excited about the next step!

Unfortunately, we're not available on any of the dates you proposed (16/03, 18/03, 20/03). However, we do have several slots available next week:

- Monday 23 Feb at 10:00, 14:00, or 16:00
- Tuesday 24 Feb at 10:00, 14:00, or 15:00
- Wednesday 25 Feb at 10:00 or 14:00

Which of these works best for you? We'll schedule via the Calendly link once confirmed. We'll also have our pitch deck ready well before the 11/03 deadline.

Looking forward to it!

Kind regards,

Edouard Schneiders
Co-founder, CaraOmics
